questions.question: Describe the key components of the Framework of Reinforcement Learning, including the agent, environment, states, actions, rewards, and decision-making process. (10 marks)
What is the difference between a Markov Decision Process (MDP) and a Markov Decision Process with Partially Observable Information (MDP-PO)? (5 marks)

An agent in a reinforcement learning problem can select from three possible actions: A, B, or C. The rewards for these actions are -1, 0, and +1, respectively. If the agent chooses action A, it receives a reward of -2. How can this information be used to modify the Q-learning update rule? (5 marks)
